airport.name: Hangzhou Xiaoshan International Airport
airport.toCity: Take Metro Line 1 to city center; use airport shuttle or taxi for convenience.

transport.metro: Metro covers major tourist spots; buy tickets or use Alipay QR code.
transport.taxi: Use metered taxis; avoid unlicensed ones and keep small change.
transport.didi: Download Didi app; set up with Alipay or WeChat for easy rides.
tips: Use metro during rush hours to avoid traffic.
Learn basic station names in Mandarin.

payment.alipay: Download Alipay; use 'Tour Pass' to link foreign card.
payment.wechatPay: Set up via WeChat; may need local assistance for verification.
payment.cash: Always carry some cash; small vendors often don't accept cards.
payment.foreignCard: Major hotels accept Visa/Mastercard; but many places prefer mobile payment.

tips: Book near metro stations for easy access.

mustTry: West Lake Fish in Vinegar Sauce
tips: Try local teahouses for authentic taste.
Be cautious with spicy dishes if sensitive.

commonScams: Fake tour guides near West Lake.

emergency.localTip: Dial 110 for police; use translation apps if English is needed.

bestTimeToVisit: Spring (April-May) and Autumn (September-October) for pleasant weather.
touristTips: Respect local customs like removing shoes indoors.
Use sunscreen and hats for sun protection.
